assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSOR 1 — real_world_framing_005 (Run 3)

Hardware distribution shift is critical. Autonomous reporting is legally non-compliant. Archive bias overestimates performance. All three block the proposed deployment.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSOR 2 — real_world_framing_005 (Run 3)

Three independent blockers. Deployment plan inappropriate. Prospective hardware validation and human-in-the-loop required.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSOR 3 — real_world_framing_005 (Run 3)

Same three issues. Consensus: deployment as proposed is inappropriate.
synthesis_raw:
SYNTHESIS — real_world_framing_005 (Ensemble, Run 3)

All three assessors identify all three issues. Verdict: critique_wins.

empirical_test.condition: Prospective validation on ≥500 new-hardware CT studies with radiologist consensus.
